source_title: Commercial property listings in Malta used to derive observed EUR/sqm/month benchmark samples
text_value: Observed comparable samples include: Birkirkara 157.8 sqm at EUR 1,800/month (~11.41 EUR/sqm/month); Gzira 200 sqm at EUR 2,800/month (14.00 EUR/sqm/month); Gzira 490 sqm at EUR 4,900/month (10.00 EUR/sqm/month); Msida 170 sqm at EUR 2,300/month (~13.53 EUR/sqm/month); Msida 150 sqm restaurant at EUR 3,000/month (20.00 EUR/sqm/month).
notes: Primary source selected for live Malta commercial listing visibility. Observed usable mid-market rent sample cluster currently sits roughly around 10-14 EUR/sqm/month, with upper comparables around 20-22 EUR/sqm/month depending on format, frontage, and use case. Keep pending until more spa-suitable comparables are captured.
benchmark_band_note: Observed mid-market cluster currently appears around 10-14 EUR/sqm/month, with upper comparables around 20-22 depending on format and location.
benchmark_use_case: Use 10-14 EUR/sqm/month as draft mid-market anchor; treat 20-22 as premium stress band.
comparator_note: Primary = broad listing portal; secondary logic comes from submarket samples.
fit_for_modeling_note: Draft-ready benchmark for overhead calibration; not final until more spa-suitable rent comparables are captured.
